title: Environment+
description: Environment+ offers you a better experience by optimizing the game, adding QOL features and more!
body:
![Featured mods in Environment+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2383852d61fd6ebe17ee47162c5df3be26881181_0.webp)

## Description
Environment+ is a modpack created by Eqinox designed to enhance your Minecraft experience by adding new features, while retaining the original essence of the game. It incorporates a variety of carefully selected mods, that each improve your experience.

This modpack is the direct continuation of my first modpack — BMC, and aims to improve off of it.
